info.description: A collection of Daylight Transport's shipping tools at your fingertips! ship-daylight APIs will allow you to perform common shipping tasks such as rate quotes, pickup requests, trace shipments, and more.
info.termsOfService: Authorized use only. Daylight Transport 2017. All rights reserved.
info.title: Daylight Transport Shipping APIs

get.description: The External Trace endpoint returns Daylight shipment tracing information for a specified probill reference.
This External Trace path endpoint returns Daylight shipment tracing information for a specified booking number reference.
The Fuel Surcharge endpoint will return the current fuel surcharge rate and discount percentage.

get.summary: Get freight invoice data for a respective probill
get.description: This invoice path will return invoice data for a specified probill.  Note that you will need to use MyDaylight credentials to authenticate your access to the data.

get.summary: Get a tiff image for a specified probill reference
get.description: This images path will return freight documents from our repository for a specified probill  reference in TIFF format.  Note that you will need to use MyDaylight credentials to authenticate your access to the documents. The best use-case is to retrieve these documents after your freight has been picked up and/or delivered.

parameters.name: doc_type
parameters.description: The document type; Bill of Lading (BOL), Delivery Receipt (DR), invoice, and Weight Inspection Certificate (WIC) is available.  The invoice contains all documents.

200.description: Successful response returns the freight document in tiff format

get.summary: Get a pdf image for a specified probill reference
get.description: This images path will return freight documents from our repository for a specified probill  reference in PDF format.  Note that you will need to use MyDaylight credentials to authenticate your access to the documents. The best use-case is to retrieve these documents after your freight has been picked up and/or delivered.

parameters.name: doc_type
parameters.description: The document type; Bill of Lading (BOL), Delivery Receipt (DR), invoice, and Weight Inspection Certificate (WIC) is available.  The invoice contains all documents.

200.description: Successful response returns the freight document in pdf format

get.summary: Returns a populated pdf image for a specified booking number reference
get.description: This images path returns a populated freight document (based on pickup request data) for a specified booking number reference in PDF format. This endpoint supports the pickup process by providing clients vital shipping documents ready for use.  Note that you will need to use MyDaylight credentials to authenticate your access to this service. Available docs: bill of ladings (bol), and shipping labels (label). The best use-case is to retrieve and use these documents prior to your scheduled pickup.

parameters.name: bookingNumber
parameters.description: Daylight booking number. This is returned from a pickup request.

parameters.name: doc_type
parameters.description: The document type; Bill of Lading (bol), Shipping Label (label).

200.description: Successful response returns the popluated freight document in pdf format

post.summary: Returns a populated bill of lading image in PDF format
post.description: This images path returns a populated Daylight bill of lading based on the values that are passed in the request. This endpoint supports the pickup process by providing clients vital shipping documents ready for use. The best use-case is to retrieve and use these documents prior to your scheduled pickup.

200.description: Successful response returns the popluated freight document in pdf format

post.summary: Returns a populated shipping label image in PDF format
post.description: This images path returns a populated Daylight shipping label based on the values that are passed in the request. This endpoint supports the pickup process by providing clients vital shipping documents ready for use. The best use-case is to retrieve and use these documents prior to your scheduled pickup.

200.description: Successful response returns the popluated freight document in pdf format

post.description: The Pickup endpoint will allow you to schedule an LTL pickup with Daylight.
The Rate Quote endpoint will allow you to retrieve an LTL shipping rate quote with Daylight.

get.description: The Rate Quote endpoint will allow you to retrieve rate quote details for a specified quote number reference.
The Transit Times endpoint will return Daylight's freight transit times for the respective origin and destination zip codes.

scopes.write:ship: modify shipping data in your account

tags.name: externalTrace
tags.description: Daylight shipment tracing information for specified shipping references

tags.name: fuelSurcharge
tags.description: Fuel surcharge rate and discount percentage

tags.name: image
tags.description: Retrieve freight document images for specified shipping references. Available in both TIFF and PDF formats.

tags.name: invoice
tags.description: Returns freight invoice data for respective shipping references

tags.name: pickup
tags.description: Schedule an LTL pickup with Daylight Transport

tags.name: rateQuote
tags.description: Retrieve LTL shipping rate quotes from Daylight

tags.name: transitTimes
tags.description: Daylight's freight transit times for respective origin and destination zip codes
